definitions.description: Transforms text into a concise summary

properties.displayName: Save time with an example of how this node works
properties.name: notice
operationMode
properties.description: How to pass data into the summarization chain

options.name: Use Node Input (JSON)
options.description: Summarize the JSON data coming into this node from the previous one

options.name: Use Node Input (Binary)
options.description: Summarize the binary data coming into this node from the previous one

options.name: Use Document Loader
options.description: Use a loader sub-node with more configuration options

options.name: Advanced
options.description: Use a splitter sub-node with more configuration options

properties.name: chunkSize
properties.description: Controls the max size (in terms of number of characters) of the final document chunk

properties.name: chunkOverlap
properties.description: Specifies how much characters overlap there should be between chunks

options.name: binaryDataKey
options.description: The name of the field in the agent or chain’s input that contains the binary file to be processed

values.prompt:
Write a concise summary of the following:


"{text}"


CONCISE SUMMARY:
values.combineMapPrompt:
Write a concise summary of the following:


"{text}"


CONCISE SUMMARY:

values.name: summarizationMethod
values.description: The type of summarization to run

options.name: Map Reduce (Recommended)
options.description: Summarize each document (or chunk) individually, then summarize those summaries

options.name: Refine
options.description: Summarize the first document (or chunk). Then update that summary based on the next document (or chunk), and repeat.

options.name: Stuff
options.description: Pass all documents (or chunks) at once. Ideal for small datasets.

values.name: combineMapPrompt
values.hint: The prompt to summarize an individual document (or chunk)
values.default:
Write a concise summary of the following:


"{text}"


CONCISE SUMMARY:

values.name: prompt
values.default:
Write a concise summary of the following:


"{text}"


CONCISE SUMMARY:
values.hint: The prompt to combine individual summaries

values.name: prompt
values.default:
Write a concise summary of the following:


"{text}"


CONCISE SUMMARY:

values.name: refinePrompt
values.default:
Your job is to produce a final summary
We have provided an existing summary up to a certain point: "{existing_answer}"
We have the opportunity to refine the existing summary
(only if needed) with some more context below.
------------
"{text}"
------------

Given the new context, refine the original summary
If the context isn't useful, return the original summary.

REFINED SUMMARY:
values.hint: The prompt to refine the summary based on the next document (or chunk)

values.name: refineQuestionPrompt
values.default:
Write a concise summary of the following:


"{text}"


CONCISE SUMMARY:
values.hint: The prompt for the first document (or chunk)

options.name: batching
options.description: Batch processing options for rate limiting

options.name: batchSize
options.description: How many items to process in parallel. This is useful for rate limiting, but might impact the log output ordering.

options.name: delayBetweenBatches
options.description: Delay in milliseconds between batches. This is useful for rate limiting.
